raw_consumer_statement: I realized that I had not received an email with my statement, so I tried logging in online to make my payment but was not able to log in so I called the company. I spoke with a representative on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX and explained the problem. He went through charges on my account and we discovered that there were numerous fraudulent charges. I told him the only charge I had made was for {$160.00} at XXXX XXXX. He told me that he removed the charges and closed the account and would send me a new card. The next day, I called to make the payment of {$160.00} over the phone. I received a confirmation # however after about 3 weeks, I still had not received the new card nor had the payment of {$160.00} come out of my checking account. I called again on XXXX XXXX and spoke with a representative. Explained the situation and discovered that additional fraudulent charges had been made on my original card and the new card that I never received. I was transferred to another representative who worked the case and told me that she had closed both of my cards and helped me to make the payment again of {$160.00} however that amount still has not been deducted from my checking account.
